---
title: "prexorctl group create"
description: "Create a new group"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

## Usage

```text
prexorctl group create [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
-h, --help                      help for create
        --max int                   Maximum instances (default 10)
        --memory int                Memory per instance (MB) (default 1024)
        --min int                   Minimum instances (default 1)
        --name string               Group name (required)
        --platform string           Platform (e.g., paper, velocity)
        --platform-version string   Platform version
        --port-end int              Port range end (default 30100)
        --port-start int            Port range start (default 30000)
        --routing string            Routing strategy (default "LOWEST_PLAYERS")
        --scaling-mode string       Scaling mode: STATIC, DYNAMIC, MANUAL (default "DYNAMIC")
        --template strings          Template names (ordered layers)
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
